case_title: ZHI NING VS. JOSE ALEXANDER QUEVEDO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NING, ZHI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, JOSE ALEXANDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NING, ZHI AS TO DEFENDANT QUEVEDO, JOSE ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.
